_design_notes.purpose: Complete OpenSearch index mapping for the Tax Authority RAG system. Supports hybrid search (BM25 + k-NN), document-level security (DLS), temporal versioning, and exact-ID retrieval shortcuts.
_design_notes.scale: Designed for ~20M chunks (500K docs × ~40 chunks/doc). HNSW params and quantization configured to prevent OOM at this scale.
_design_notes.memory_estimate: 20M vectors × 1024 dim × 4 bytes (fp32) = ~81.9 GB raw. With SQ8 quantization: ~20.5 GB. With HNSW graph overhead (~1.5x): ~30.7 GB. Fits in a 3-node cluster with 32GB RAM each.

settings._shard_notes: 6 shards for 20M docs allows ~3.3M chunks per shard. OpenSearch recommends 10-50GB per shard. At ~4KB per chunk doc, each shard is ~13.3GB. 1 replica for HA. Increase to 2 replicas for read-heavy production workload.

chunk_id._comment: Deterministic chunk identifier. Used for deduplication (upsert on re-index) and citation validation (post-generation check that cited chunk_ids exist in retrieved context).

doc_id._comment: Document-level identifier. Indexed as keyword for exact filtering. Used in cache invalidation: when doc is re-indexed, invalidate all cache entries referencing this doc_id.

doc_type._comment: LEGISLATION | CASE_LAW | POLICY | ELEARNING. Used for faceted filtering and document-type-specific retrieval strategies.

title._comment: Full-text searchable with Dutch legal analyzer. Keyword sub-field for exact aggregations.

chunk_text._comment: The actual chunk content. Indexed for BM25 full-text search using Dutch legal analyzer (stemming, stop words). This is the primary field for sparse retrieval.

embedding._comment: Dense vector embedding from multilingual-e5-large (1024-dim). HNSW index with m=16 (16 bidirectional links per node, balances memory and recall), ef_construction=256 (high quality graph construction, one-time build cost). Space type: cosine similarity (normalized for E5 embeddings). Engine: nmslib (fastest for HNSW in OpenSearch). ef_search=128 is set at index level in settings.
embedding._memory_note: 20M vectors × 1024 dim × 4 bytes = 81.9 GB (fp32). Apply SQ8 quantization to reduce to ~20.5 GB. See quantization config below.

article_num._comment: Article number (e.g., '3.114', '67a'). Keyword for exact match. Used in exact-ID retrieval shortcut when query contains article reference patterns.

chapter._comment: Chapter identifier. Used for hierarchical filtering.

hierarchy_path._comment: Full breadcrumb path. Text-analyzed for search, keyword sub-field for exact display in citations.

effective_date._comment: Date this version became effective. Used in temporal filter: effective_date <= NOW. Critical for returning only current law by default.

expiry_date._comment: Date this version was superseded. Null = currently active. Used in temporal filter: expiry_date IS NULL OR expiry_date > NOW.

version._comment: Document version number. Enables sorting by version to get the latest amendment.

security_classification._comment: PUBLIC | INTERNAL | RESTRICTED | CLASSIFIED_FIOD. THIS IS THE CRITICAL RBAC FIELD. OpenSearch Document-Level Security (DLS) roles filter on this field BEFORE any scoring occurs. See rbac_roles.json for the DLS query definitions.

source_url._comment: Stored but not indexed. Returned in search results for end-user source verification.

parent_chunk_id._comment: Parent node in document hierarchy. Enables parent-child retrieval: fetch parent article when a paragraph chunk is retrieved.

language._comment: nl | en | nl-en. Used for language-specific filtering if needed.

ecli_id._comment: ECLI identifier for case law. Enables exact-ID retrieval shortcut: queries matching ECLI pattern (ECLI:NL:*) bypass vector search and use direct keyword filter on this field.

amendment_refs._comment: Array of doc_ids this document references or is referenced by. Enables cross-reference expansion.

chunk_sequence._comment: Order within parent structural unit. Enables document reconstruction.

token_count._comment: Chunk token count. Used for analytics and monitoring chunk size distribution.

ingestion_timestamp._comment: When this chunk was indexed. Used for cache invalidation tracking.

_quantization_config._comment: Apply AFTER initial indexing. Reduces memory footprint ~4x with <2% recall loss.
_quantization_config.method: OpenSearch disk-based vector search with Faiss SQ8 quantization
steps: 1. For new index, use faiss engine with SQ (scalar quantization) encoder instead of nmslib:
2. fp16 quantization: 1024 dim × 2 bytes = 2KB per vector (vs 4KB fp32). 20M vectors = ~40 GB.
3. For maximum compression, use 'type': 'sq8' (1 byte per dim): 20M × 1KB = ~20 GB.
4. Trade-off: fp16 has negligible recall loss. sq8 has ~1-2% recall loss but 4x memory savings.
5. Recommendation: Use fp16 for primary index. If memory-constrained, use sq8 with higher ef_search (192) to compensate.

_search_pipeline_config._comment: OpenSearch search pipeline for hybrid search with RRF normalization.
_search_pipeline_config.description: Combines BM25 and k-NN results using Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF).

_rrf_alternative._comment: OpenSearch 2.15+ supports RRF natively. Preferred over score normalization because BM25 and cosine scores have different distributions.

_search_pipeline_config._recommendation: Use RRF (rank_constant=60) if on OpenSearch 2.15+. Fall back to weighted arithmetic_mean with weights [0.4 BM25, 0.6 kNN] on older versions.

_temporal_filter_template._comment: Default query filter to return only currently-effective legal provisions. Applied to every query unless the user explicitly requests historical data.
